mapper.select: select * from aiw_news_article where source_code = #{sourceCode} and external_id = #{externalId}
mapper.insert: insert into aiw_news_article (biz_id, external_id, article_type, title, summary, content, source_code, source_url, language_code, publish_time, collected_at, created_at, is_deleted) values (#{bizId}, #{externalId}, #{articleType}, #{title}, #{summary}, #{content}, #{sourceCode}, #{sourceUrl}, #{languageCode}, #{publishTime}, #{collectedAt}, #{createdAt}, #{deleted}) on duplicate key update article_type = values(article_type), title = values(title), summary = values(summary), content = values(content), source_url = values(source_url), language_code = values(language_code), publish_time = values(publish_time), collected_at = values(collected_at), is_deleted = 0
